spotlight.title: This Month: Isawisima
spotlight.intro: Once a month, we honor one member whose effort, care & spirit help the guild move together.
body: This month we lift a lantern for Isawisima and the steady care they bring to the hall.
They answer questions, welcome new steps, and help shared runs feel easier to enter.
In busy hours, that calm presence matters: one kind reply can turn a new name into someone remembered.
spotlight.conclusion: Thank you for the warmth, patience, and small acts that keep Mōchirīī moving together.
